cases.title: Complaint against Pacific Presbytery
cases.synopsis: A judicial complaint against Pacific Presbytery alleged that its August 4, 1975 actions on non-routine matters were taken without the constitutionally required quorum of three teaching and three ruling elders. After the Committee prepared to sustain the complaint in part, Pacific Presbytery held a duly constituted meeting on September 10, 1975 and ratified the prior actions; the Committee then recommended and the Assembly adopted a dismissal of the complaint.
